faqs.answer: Mouse extermination in Bellerose typically costs between $350 and $600, depending on the severity of the infestation, property size, and number of entry points. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes before beginning any work, ensuring transparent pricing with no hidden fees.

faqs.answer: Our comprehensive approach includes thorough inspection, strategic trap placement, rodent-proofing entry points, and sanitation recommendations.
